title: selago pterophylla
intro: Selago pterophylla, also known as Cape clematis or harp's tongue, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selago pterophylla include relieving congestion, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential use in treating digestive issues and fever. Herbal preparations of Selago pterophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
